description: Enhance visual simulation with Mobile/NPM previews, dynamic badges, and improved editor UX.

tasks: [ ] Build Mobile Preview simulation (GitHub mobile layout)
[ ] Add support for NPM Registry preview mode
[ ] Implement synchronized auto-scrolling between editor and simulator
[ ] Add pre-built README templates (React app, CLI tool, API library)
[ ] Implement more dynamic badges (npm downloads, GitHub stars, WakaTime)
[ ] Create an interactive visual badge configuration UI
[ ] Add advanced search and replace for workspace markdown links

technical_goals: Optimize webview memory usage when rendering heavy markdown/images
next_version_considerations: Preparation for the core audit logic extraction in v1.3.0
